title: Project 1: Expository Visualization
description: A DSC 106 project focused on creating an explanatory visualization that clearly communicates data to an audience.

title: Project 2: Persuasive/Deceptive Visualization
description: A DSC 106 project focused on using visualization design choices to persuade an audience or show how charts can be misleading.

title: Project 3: Interactive Visualization
description: A DSC 106 project focused on building an interactive visualization that lets users explore data.

title: Final Project
description: The final DSC 106 project applying data visualization, design, interaction, and communication skills.

title: Lab 1: Introduction to the Web Platform
description: A lab focused on building the basic structure of a personal website using HTML.

title: Lab 2: Styling with CSS
description: A lab focused on styling a personal website with CSS, layout, spacing, and visual design.

title: Lab 3: Introduction to JavaScript
description: A lab focused on adding JavaScript behavior to a personal website.

title: Lab 4: JavaScript II
description: A lab focused on JavaScript modules, JSON project data, reusable rendering functions, and API data.

title: Personal Website
description: A personal portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: Recipe Rating Analysis
description: A data science project analyzing recipe ratings and building a model to predict user ratings.

title: Internet Coverage Project
description: A project analyzing internet coverage data in California before and after COVID-19.

title: You Can Be Better
description: An educational project focused on online learning habits, student well-being, and practical study guides.
